title: AI RESEARCH ENGINEER | TELECOMMUNICATIONS & DEEP LEARNING
objective: AI and Deep Learning Engineer with a strong foundation in Telecommunications Engineering and a recent MSc graduate with highest academic honors (10/10 Thesis). Passionate about bridging the gap between cutting-edge AI research and scalable, production-ready software applications. Brings comprehensive expertise in end-to-end development, from designing energy-efficient ML models, GenAI systems, and LLM-RAG pipelines to building robust Python and React-based full-stack platforms. Proven track record in reproducible benchmarking, agent-based orchestration, and optimizing data-intensive deep learning algorithms across heterogeneous edge and server hardware. Currently serving as a CTO, leveraging a multidisciplinary technical background to drive architecture strategy and deliver intelligent, highly optimized digital products.

responsibilities: Architecting and developing a brand-new, end-to-end platform for the company as the technical leader.
Building scalable Python backends and interactive, responsive React/JavaScript frontends.
Designing application architecture, managing deployment workflows, and leading tech-stack decision-making within the Lanzadera startup accelerator ecosystem.

experience.position: Master Thesis Researcher – Sustainable AI (SAI), Part time
experience.location: CTTC – Centre Tecnològic de Telecomunicacions de Catalunya, Barcelona | Supervisors: Dr. Roberto Pereira, Dr. Paolo Dini
responsibilities: Conducted advanced research on energy-efficient deep learning, earning a perfect score of 10/10 on the Master's thesis presentation.
Profiled training/inference costs and CO₂ emissions across heterogeneous hardware (Jetson, laptop GPUs, server nodes).
Benchmarked CNN, LSTM/GRU, and contrastive learning models for image and time-series tasks under diverse training settings.
Designed measurement campaigns using CodeCarbon and deployed models on edge devices to study runtime constraints, memory limits, and batch-size effects.
Boosted MobileNet/EfficientNet stability on constrained hardware, achieving 60%+ accuracy on CIFAR-100 with resource-aware training recipes.
Developed an internal Python tool to automate ML training pipelines, experiment tracking, and result parsing. GitHub: SustainVision
Developed multilingual LLM and NLP pipelines in Catalan, Spanish, and English for workplace well-being and communication analytics.
Integrated Llama-based conversational components for multilingual human-machine interaction, including context handling, routing logic, and API-based inference services.
Achieved 96% message-filtering accuracy and 91% engagement-score prediction using transformer embeddings and XGBoost models.
Built privacy-compliant preprocessing pipelines and production-ready REST APIs for internal AI services.
Implemented unit and integration tests with Pytest to support reliable deployment across cloud and edge environments.

experience.position: AI & Backend Engineer (R&D – MAXSENS Project), Fulltime
responsibilities: Developed Flask APIs for real-time EMG and motion data processing, enabling scalable and modular AI pipelines.
Built CNN and LSTM models achieving 94% gesture-classification accuracy on high-dimensional physiological and time-series signals.
Improved signal-processing efficiency by 30% through optimized filtering and feature-extraction workflows.
Automated analytics report generation in CSV, PDF, and JPG formats, reducing manual handling by 60%.
Implemented posture and motion detection features that reduced exercise-execution errors by 40%.
Collaborated with clinical and product teams to align ML outputs with real-world use cases.
Designed and maintained REST APIs in Python/Django for fraud detection and transaction classification.
Created system architecture and UML diagrams to improve communication across teams.
Contributed to roadmap planning and sprint execution in a cross-functional product environment.
Worked with UI/UX teams to improve onboarding workflows for early users.

education: MSc in Telecommunications Engineering (MATT) – Specialization in Deep Learning for Multimedia Processing | Universitat Politècnica de Catalunya (UPC), Barcelona | 2023 – 2025 | 10/10 Thesis, Highest Academic Honors
Bachelor's in Information Technology Engineering | Azad University, Karaj | 2015 – 2020

Deep Learning & AI Research: PyTorch, Scikit-learn, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib; CNNs, LSTMs/GRUs, transfer learning, contrastive learning, self-supervised learning, model evaluation
GenAI & NLP Systems: Hugging Face, Llama models, multilingual NLP, transformer embeddings, LLM-RAG pipelines, vector stores, agentic workflows
Full-Stack & Backend Engineering: React, JavaScript (frontend); Django, Flask (backend), REST APIs, asynchronous processing, application architecture, ingestion pipelines
Efficient AI & Edge Systems: CodeCarbon, GPU/CPU/RAM profiling, hardware-aware benchmarking, resource-constrained optimization (edge vs. server)
Testing, Infrastructure & CI/CD: Pytest, unit/integration testing, API testing; Docker, cloud endpoints, workflow orchestration, Sphinx/OpenAPI documentation
